channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Aldi's Classes Trapper's
item.description: Custom adli's Trapper classes

item.title: SubZero Farming
item.description: Allow crops to grow even in sub freezing temperatures.

item.title: Mad Foundation
item.description: Enhancements and bug fixes for vanilla useful for modding.

item.title: Metals of Myths [ALPHA]
item.description: An addon for Improved Metallurgy that extends progression even further by adding fantasy metals.

item.title: Just Kobold Traits
item.description: Adds just traits to Kobolds from Kobold Player Redux.

item.title: Real Smoke & Ancient Tools Fork
item.description: Pitch torches are smoky now.

item.title: HybrasilRaces
item.description: Races for Hybrasil server

item.title: FAclasses
item.description: Faclasses

item.title: Prospector's Dispatch
item.description: Stop aimlessly wandering the wilderness searching for that resource you need.

item.title: CrimsonsSelfIgnitingForge Fork
item.description: Updated ForgeSelfIgnite for VS 1.22+. Automatically re-ignites forges when hot and fueled.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Rock Trader
item.description: Just a trader to sell stones and rocks

item.title: Oils! Resoaped Standalone
item.description: Oils! Resoaped. A content mod that adds plant oils & their uses as well as some alternative recipes.

item.title: AutoСhisel
item.description: Automatic multi-color chiseling of .vox models and procedural shapes with live hologram preview

item.title: Chest Organizer Plus M4
item.description: same as https://mods.vintagestory.at/chestorganizer working on game version 1.22.0 stable

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all vanilla armor designs for each respective armor pieces.

item.title: Better Bread Satiety
item.description: Increases the satiety of bread to make it more competitive with other grain options

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: Specialized Backpacks
item.description: A few backpacks that provide buffs to the wearer, and of course more inventory space.

item.title: Struggle To Sleep
item.description: Not snuggle, STRUGGLE! You can only sleep if certain conditions are met.

item.title: Sleeping Bag
item.description: A sleeping bag that can be worn in the waist slot. Sneak + R-click to pickup and auto-equip.

item.title: Claim Activity Permissions
item.description: Opens specific Vintage Story claim actions without granting general build or break access.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped
item.description: Oils! Resoaped. A content mod that adds plant oils & their uses as well as some alternative recipes.

item.title: rawNature
item.description: Adds materials, recipes, items, and a new balance of things to the game

item.title: Glassmaking
item.description: A set of mechanics for creating glass-related recipes

item.title: Extra Overlays-1.22+
item.description: same as https://mods.vintagestory.at/extraoverlays working on vesion 1.22.0+

item.title: Chunk Loader
item.description: Allows players to keep chunks active when far away via customizable chat commands.

item.title: SoldierSpy - Brassworks
item.description: An expansion upon what can be done with brass. Made with love & pain. No AI.

item.title: Ozzie's Clothing
item.description: A simple clothing mod, this is my first attempt at modding so don't expect it to be that good.

item.title: Simulated Water Runoff
item.description: While raining, drips will spawn on overhanging block faces and drip down realistically
